features.description: Phase 1: Backend Core - Spring Boot setup, PostgreSQL schema, DashboardService implementations, REST controllers
Create orders table structure and load sample data
Implement DashboardService: getKPIs(), getOrderVolumeTimeSeries(), getDeliveryPerformance(), getCarrierBreakdown()
Implement REST controllers for dashboard endpoints
Write unit tests for aggregation queries
Phase 2: AI Orchestration - Add OpenAI client, define tools as Java classes, implement NLUOrchestrator
Implement getBreakdown and getTimeSeries services
Implement POST /api/query endpoint with validation and error handling
Phase 3: Forecasting - Implement ForecastingService with exponential smoothing, add POST /api/forecast endpoint
Test forecasting with historical data, calculate MAE
Phase 4: Frontend - Initialize Vue 3 + Vite + Pinia + ECharts
Build dashboard pages: KPI cards and charts calling backend APIs
Build natural language query interface: input, submission, display of answer/chart/explanation/raw table
Build forecasting page: controls, chart, recommendations
Add global date range picker and filters (sync across components)
Phase 5: Deployment - Write Dockerfile for backend (Spring Boot)
Write multi-stage Dockerfile for frontend (nginx)
Write docker-compose.yml (backend+PostgreSQL+frontend)
Set up environment variables (OPENAI_API_KEY, DB_URL, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD)
Deploy to public URL (Render.com, Fly.io, or similar)
Phase 6: Documentation - Create README.md with local run guide, architecture diagram, AI method explanation, assumptions and limitations
